name: setBasicFilter
description: Sets a basic filter (auto-filter) on a Google Spreadsheet sheet, enabling filter dropdowns on the header row.

spreadsheetId.description: The ID of the Google Spreadsheet.

sheetId.description: The sheet ID (from getSpreadsheetInfo). If not specified, uses the first sheet.

startRowIndex.description: Start row index (0-based). Usually 0 for header row.

endRowIndex.description: End row index (exclusive). Omit to include all rows.
